title: CSIR NIO Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate I Posts
description: CSIR National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR-NIO) has officially released the notification for the recruitment of various Project Associate I Jobs. Candidates who have completed their M.Sc can take the chance and apply for the CSIR NIO Notification 2026 . Here we have included more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply on or before the last date of ap...
